title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama’s official repo: a lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux and Windows with a single CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for seamless local LLM inference in notebooks, scripts or services.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, enabling chat, generate and embedding calls against a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package providing LangChain LLM, chat and embeddings integrations backed by any model served through Ollama.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, PDF upload and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: idiomatic Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, offering builders, async calls and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-cli
summary: A batteries-included CLI wrapper that adds conversation history, prompt templates and shell completions on top of the native ollama command.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that swaps OpenAI Codex for any code-generation model running in Ollama.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal SvelteKit UI for chatting with local Ollama models, deployable as a static site or Docker container.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration that lets pipelines use Ollama models for generative QA, summarization and embeddings.

title: ollama-rag
summary: End-to-end retrieval-augmented-generation template combining Ollama, Chroma and LangChain for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into threads with slash commands and per-server model configs.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community n8n node that exposes Ollama generate/chat operations inside no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that adds session memory, model switching and export-to-markdown for local Ollama instances.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) with multi-arch support and docker-compose examples for production deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling, PVC and optional NVIDIA plugin.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library that brings strongly-typed Ollama APIs to C# with IAsyncEnumerable streaming and dependency-injection helpers.
